en: I'll tell you where I'd like to live. Outnumbered world.
You know that show, Outnumbered? Oh, yeah. Cos I've got three kids, right, and I don't understand,.
ko: 아웃넘버드 세계. 그 프로그램 알지? 응. 나 아이가 셋인데 이해가 안 돼.

en: Where's the shouting? There's no shouting in that show, is there?
There's no, like, I'll just brush your teeth!
It'd be a very different show, I think, if you were the lead. There's no whisky in the airing cupboard,.
ko: 그 쇼에 소리 지르는 거 없잖아. "양치 좀 해!" 같은.

en: Mummy crying in the garden, none of that.
ko: 그 쇼에 소리 지르는 거 없잖아. "양치 좀 해!" 같은.

en: What do you think? You live in a fictional world anyway, don't you? Do I?
ko: 네가 주인공이면 아주 다른 쇼가 됐겠지. 장롱에 위스키도 없고 엄마가 정원에서 우는 것도 없고.

en: You know that show that you're in? Would you like to live in Walford?
ko: 정말 멋진 곳이야. 크리스찬, 어디서 살고 싶어?

en: No. If there was a real place? No. No. I would. Yeah, so would I. I would.
ko: 어차피 가상 세계에 사는 거 아니야? 그래?

en: I'd like to live in Walford, because you can make a living selling four apples a week.
What a brilliant place. Where would you like to live, Christian?

ko: 월퍼드에 살고 싶어? 아니. 진짜라면? 아니. 나는 그래. 사과 네 개 팔아서 먹고살 수 있잖아.

en: What about Hogwarts? That is the right answer. Brilliant.
Yes, the top fictional place that you'd like to live is Hogwarts.
ko: 대단한 곳이지. 어디 살고 싶어 크리스천? 천국.

en: J.K. Rowling made more money out of a pint-sized wizard than anyone since Debbie McGee.
ko: J.K. 롤링은 데비 맥기 이후로 가장 많은 돈을 작은 마법사로 벌었어.
